# Arizona Pirate Party

> The Arizona Pirate Party is an emerging Arizona political party focused on digital reform, government transparency, privacy, and civil liberties.

## Core pages

- [Home](https://azpirateparty.org/): Arizona Pirate Party overview with calls to join Discord, support the party, and become a member.
- [Platform](https://azpirateparty.org/platform.html): Long-form platform covering privacy, transparency, civil liberties, healthcare, education, and reform positions.
- [Join](https://azpirateparty.org/join.html): Membership signup form and organizer contact paths.
- [Donate](https://azpirateparty.org/donate.html): Donation link and donor transparency requirements.
- [Merch](https://azpirateparty.org/merch.html): Arizona Pirate Party merch with Stripe checkout.
- [Candidates](https://azpirateparty.org/candidates.html): 2026 candidate information.
- [About](https://azpirateparty.org/about.html): Council, officer, and county captain roles.

## Contact

- Email: arizonapirateparty@gmail.com
- Discord: https://discord.gg/6byTSC22NW
- X: https://x.com/AZPirateParty
- Bluesky: https://bsky.app/profile/azpirateparty.org
